scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,PAYMENT,CLIENT -c blue,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:payment" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../payment-service && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.validate:full: npm run lint:client && npm run build:client && npm run test:server && npm run test:payment
